spec_match.rationale: Concept exercises the relevant API surface (Translator, translate() with runtime script (~5728 chars) wired to live controls, in line with the feature summary.

interactive.rationale: Real interactive surface — 2 buttons, 0 inputs, 2 selects, 0 ranges — wired up via event listeners.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept lede matches the feature-index promise on key terms (instance, item, list, parallel, single, strings, translate, translator).

edge_cases.rationale: Some failure / fallback handling shown (11 hits), but the demo skews toward the happy path and doesn't surface most edge cases the spec calls out.

references.rationale: References section cites the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link directly.

design_system.rationale: 1 button rule(s) override `background` without also overriding `color`. The global button rule sets both, so this leaves the text colour inherited from the dark default (CLAUDE.md rule #6).

runtime_evidence.rationale: The post-fix direct browser sweep loaded the route, exercised every detected control, and found no runtime, action, naming, or navigation failure.

summary: Stops stale asynchronous translation results from writing into rows removed by a later rerender. Post-fix validation passed.
